title: Red Shuttle
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Red Shuttle''' was a blocky [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] made by [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]] and stationed aboard the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]''. In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], [[Nichos Marr/Legends|Nichos Marr]] operated the shuttle via remote control in order to evacuate the inhabitants of the ''Eye''.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]
